     The Numbers Business Report

Promising Young Woman (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $6,460,965Details
International Box Office $12,393,201
Worldwide Box Office $18,854,166
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $679,625
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $856,785
Total $1,536,410
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Everyone said Cassie was a promising young woman… until a mysterious event abruptly derailed her future. But nothing in Cassie’s life is what it appears to be: she’s wickedly smart, tantalizingly cunning, and she’s living a secret double life by night. Now, an unexpected encounter is about to give Cassie a chance to right the wrongs of the past.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$719,305 (11.1% of total gross)
Legs:8.98 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:34.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:1,310 opening theaters/1,448 max. theaters, 10.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $7,751,372

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2020 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: December 25th, 2020 (Wide) (Netherlands)
January 1st, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
January 7th, 2021 (Wide) (New Zealand)
January 21st, 2021 (Wide), released as Девушка, подающая надежды (Russia (CIS))
February 12th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: January 15th, 2021 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong violence including sexual assault, language throughout, some sexual material and drug use.
(Rating bulletin 2621 (Cert #52187), 3/18/2020)
Running Time: 113 minutes
Award nomination: 2021 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: BAFTA Best Original Screenplay Winner, Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Film festival: Sundance Film Festival 2020
Plot point: Revenge
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Black Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: FilmNation Entertainment, LuckyChap Entertainment, Focus Features
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom
Languages: English

Synopsis

Everyone said Cassie was a promising young woman… until a mysterious event abruptly derailed her future. But nothing in Cassie’s life is what it appears to be: she’s wickedly smart, tantalizingly cunning, and she’s living a secret double life by night. Now, an unexpected encounter is about to give Cassie a chance to right the wrongs of the past.
